_comment: Per-module Rack paramId layout for UAT scripting. paramId is a raw Rack Module::paramId int (POST /params body field), NOT a P/B/S label -- see .claude/skills/uat-bridge/SKILL.md 'paramId lookup tables'. Each module cites its _source (plugin/src/<Module>.cpp ParamId enum) so this file can be regenerated/checked by hand against the code.

master.note: enum ParamId { PARAMS_LEN } -- no scriptable params; 8 CV inputs (IN_INPUTS 0-7), 8 CV outputs (OUT_OUTPUTS 0-7) are ports, not params.

master18.note: no scriptable params; gate I1/I2 + 4 gate in/out + 8 CV outputs are ports.

p2b8.note: enum ParamId { ENUMS(POT_PARAMS, 2), ENUMS(BUTTON_PARAMS, 8) }: paramId 0-1 = P<c>.1-2, paramId 2-9 = B<c>.1-8.

p4b2.note: enum ParamId { ENUMS(POT_PARAMS, 4), ENUMS(BUTTON_PARAMS, 2) }: paramId 0-3 = P<c>.1-4, paramId 4-5 = B<c>.1-2.

p10.note: enum ParamId { ENUMS(POT_PARAMS, 10) }: paramId 0-9 = P<c>.1-10. No buttons/LEDs/switches.

s10.note: enum ParamId { ENUMS(ROTARY_PARAMS, 2), ENUMS(TOGGLE_PARAMS, 8) }: paramId 0-1 = S<c>.1-2 (rotary, 0-7), paramId 2-9 = S<c>.3-10 (3-way toggle, 0/1/2).

p8s8.note: enum ParamId { ENUMS(SLIDER_PARAMS, 8), ENUMS(TOGGLE_PARAMS, 8) }: paramId 0-7 = P<c>.1-8 (sliders), paramId 8-15 = S<c>.1-8 (3-way toggles).

b32.note: enum ParamId { ENUMS(BUTTON_PARAMS, 32) }: paramId 0-31 = B<c>.1-32 (paramId = n-1).

e4.note: enum ParamId { PARAMS_LEN } -- no scriptable params. 4 endless encoders are internal monotonic detent counters driven by the widget, not params; push is likewise internal state. Bridge cannot drive turn or push.

touch_plates.note: set 1 to simulate a grab/touch (matches hardware touch-plate-as-sensor); the plate press is ALSO the step/B-button surface (motoquencer step gate/skip/pattern toggle) -- see SKILL.md 'M4 touch plate != fader grab'. Each plate press toggles the step once; pair presses to keep gates unchanged.

m4.note: enum ParamId { ENUMS(FADER_PARAMS, 4), ENUMS(TOUCH_PARAMS, 4) }: paramId 0-3 = faders, paramId 4-7 = touch plates.

g8.note: enum ParamId { PARAMS_LEN } -- no controls at all; 8 bidirectional gate jacks exposed as an input port + output port pair per jack (GATE_INPUTS 0-7, GATE_OUTPUTS 0-7). Use /cables and /probe, not /params.

db8e.note: enum ParamId (per file header/comment): 8 face buttons are paramId 0-7 = B<c>.1-8. The encoder E<c>.1 (push B<c>.9, ring L<c>.9) has NO param -- same reasoning as e4, bridge cannot drive it.

x7.note: no controls; USB + TRS MIDI ports plus 4 gate outputs (G9-G12). Use /master/{id}/midi-port(s) for MIDI routing, /cables and /probe for gate I/O.

bling.note: config(0,0,0,0) -- 1 HP decorative blind panel, pure pass-through in the expander chain. No params, inputs, outputs, or lights.
